name: Aceh (Indonesia)
description: A green field charged at the centre with the Pancacita seal of Aceh.
history: Adopted by the Aceh Provincial People's Representative Council on 22 March 2013 (Qanun No. 3/2013) as the official flag of the Special Region of Aceh. The Indonesian central government has objected on the grounds that the design replicates the flag of the former separatist Free Aceh Movement (GAM, 1976 to 2005); a final negotiated status remains unresolved. (The provincial parliament's red-and-white-and-black crescent-star design was rejected by the national government; the green seal flag is shown here.)
